name: No-Crust Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the sweet potatoes and cook them.
2. Mash the cooked sweet potatoes until smooth.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the mashed sweet potatoes, sugar, flour, softened butter or margarine, egg, and almond extract.
4. Beat the mixture at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Spoon the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
6. Bake at 450°F for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Serve warm or cool with a dollop of whipped cream.
